import { createHotContext as __vite__createHotContext } from "/@vite/client";import.meta.hot = __vite__createHotContext("/src/app/components/VoiceInput.tsx");import { Fragment, jsxDEV } from "/@id/__x00__figma:react-jsx-dev-runtime";
import * as RefreshRuntime from "/@react-refresh";
const inWebWorker = typeof WorkerGlobalScope !== "undefined" && self instanceof WorkerGlobalScope;
let prevRefreshReg;
let prevRefreshSig;
if (import.meta.hot && !inWebWorker) {
  if (!window.$RefreshReg$) {
    throw new Error(
      "@vitejs/plugin-react can't detect preamble. Something is wrong."
    );
  }
  prevRefreshReg = window.$RefreshReg$;
  prevRefreshSig = window.$RefreshSig$;
  window.$RefreshReg$ = RefreshRuntime.getRefreshReg("/workspaces/default/code/src/app/components/VoiceInput.tsx");
  window.$RefreshSig$ = RefreshRuntime.createSignatureFunctionForTransform;
}
var _s = $RefreshSig$();
import { FGCmp } from "/@id/fginspector";
import { useState, useEffect, useRef } from "/@id/__x00__figma:react-base";
import { Mic, MicOff, Loader2 } from "/node_modules/.vite/deps/lucide-react.js?v=25293e4c";
export default function VoiceInput({
  onTranscript,
  onError,
  className = "",
  variant = "button",
  size = "md"
}) {
  _s();
  const [isRecording, setIsRecording] = useState(false);
  const [isProcessing, setIsProcessing] = useState(false);
  const [isSupported, setIsSupported] = useState(true);
  const [permissionDenied, setPermissionDenied] = useState(false);
  const recognitionRef = useRef(null);
  useEffect(() => {
    const SpeechRecognitionAPI = window.SpeechRecognition || window.webkitSpeechRecognition;
    if (!SpeechRecognitionAPI) {
      setIsSupported(false);
      return;
    }
    const recognition = new SpeechRecognitionAPI();
    recognition.continuous = false;
    recognition.interimResults = false;
    recognition.lang = "en-US";
    recognition.maxAlternatives = 1;
    recognition.onstart = () => {
      setIsRecording(true);
      setIsProcessing(false);
    };
    recognition.onresult = (event) => {
      const transcript = event.results[0][0].transcript;
      onTranscript(transcript);
      setIsProcessing(false);
    };
    recognition.onerror = (event) => {
      let errorMessage = "Voice recognition error occurred";
      let showAlert = true;
      const expectedErrors = ["not-allowed", "aborted", "no-speech"];
      if (!expectedErrors.includes(event.error)) {
        console.error("Speech recognition error:", event.error);
      }
      switch (event.error) {
        case "no-speech":
          errorMessage = "No speech detected. Please try again.";
          break;
        case "audio-capture":
          errorMessage = "No microphone found. Please check your device.";
          break;
        case "not-allowed":
          setPermissionDenied(true);
          showAlert = false;
          break;
        case "network":
          errorMessage = "Network error. Please check your connection.";
          break;
        case "aborted":
          showAlert = false;
          break;
        default:
          errorMessage = `Voice recognition error: ${event.error}`;
      }
      if (showAlert) {
        if (onError) {
          onError(errorMessage);
        } else {
          alert(`⚠️ ${errorMessage}`);
        }
      }
      setIsRecording(false);
      setIsProcessing(false);
    };
    recognition.onend = () => {
      setIsRecording(false);
      setIsProcessing(false);
    };
    recognitionRef.current = recognition;
    return () => {
      if (recognitionRef.current) {
        recognitionRef.current.stop();
      }
    };
  }, [onTranscript, onError]);
  const toggleRecording = () => {
    if (!recognitionRef.current) return;
    if (isRecording) {
      recognitionRef.current.stop();
      setIsRecording(false);
      setIsProcessing(true);
    } else {
      try {
        recognitionRef.current.start();
      } catch (error) {
        console.error("Failed to start recognition:", error);
        const errorMessage = "Failed to start voice recognition";
        if (onError) {
          onError(errorMessage);
        } else {
          alert(`⚠️ ${errorMessage}`);
        }
      }
    }
  };
  if (!isSupported) {
    return null;
  }
  const sizeClasses = {
    sm: {
      button: "px-3 py-2 text-sm",
      icon: "p-2",
      iconSize: "w-4 h-4"
    },
    md: {
      button: "px-4 py-3",
      icon: "p-3",
      iconSize: "w-5 h-5"
    },
    lg: {
      button: "px-6 py-3 text-lg",
      icon: "p-4",
      iconSize: "w-6 h-6"
    }
  };
  const currentSize = sizeClasses[size];
  if (variant === "icon") {
    return /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(
      FGCmp,
      {
        _fgT: "button",
        _fgS: "bach0",
        _fgB: 1779104383612,
        onClick: toggleRecording,
        disabled: isProcessing,
        type: "button",
        title: isRecording ? "Stop recording" : "Start voice input",
        className: `${currentSize.icon} rounded-xl transition-all flex items-center justify-center relative ${isRecording ? "bg-red-500 hover:bg-red-600 animate-pulse" : isProcessing ? "bg-teal-500/50 cursor-wait" : "bg-gradient-to-br from-teal-500/30 to-teal-600/20 hover:from-teal-500/40 hover:to-teal-600/30 border-2 border-teal-400/40"} ${className}`,
        style: !isRecording && !isProcessing ? {
          animation: "mic-breathe 1.8s ease-in-out infinite"
        } : void 0,
        "data-fg-bach0": "418.170:655.2347:/src/app/components/VoiceInput.tsx:168:7:4565:3003:e:button:xtxtxte",
        children: [
          !isRecording && !isProcessing && /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(Fragment, { children: [
            /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(
              FGCmp,

                _fgT: "div",
                _fgS: "bach4",

                className: "absolute inset-0 rounded-xl bg-gradient-to-br from-teal-400/20 to-teal-500/10",
                style: { animation: "mic-ring-1 1.8s ease-in-out infinite" },
                "data-fg-bach4": "418.170:655.2347:/src/app/components/VoiceInput.tsx:187:13:5406:176:e:div"
              },
              void 0,

                "data-fg-bach5": "418.170:655.2347:/src/app/components/VoiceInput.tsx:189:13:5595:180:e:div"
              },
              void 0,

                lineNumber: 209,

              },

            )
          ] }, void 0, true, {
            fileName: "/workspaces/default/code/src/app/components/VoiceInput.tsx",
            lineNumber: 206,
            columnNumber: 9
          }, this),
          isProcessing ? /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: Loader2, _fgS: "bach7", _fgB: 1779104383612, className: `${currentSize.iconSize} text-teal-300 animate-spin relative z-10`, "data-fg-bach7": "418.170:655.2347:/src/app/components/VoiceInput.tsx:195:11:5838:90:e:Loader2::::::XrB" }, void 0, false, {
            fileName: "/workspaces/default/code/src/app/components/VoiceInput.tsx",
            lineNumber: 215,
            columnNumber: 9
          }, this) : isRecording ? /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: MicOff, _fgS: "bach8", _fgB: 1779104383612, className: `${currentSize.iconSize} text-white relative z-10`, "data-fg-bach8": "418.170:655.2347:/src/app/components/VoiceInput.tsx:197:11:5967:73:e:MicOff::::::Bvbi" }, void 0, false, {
            fileName: "/workspaces/default/code/src/app/components/VoiceInput.tsx",
            lineNumber: 217,
            columnNumber: 9
          }, this) : /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(
            FGCmp,
            {
              _fgT: Mic,
              _fgS: "bach9",
              _fgB: 1779104383612,
              className: `${currentSize.iconSize} text-teal-300 relative z-10`,
              style: {
                animation: "mic-icon-pulse 1.8s ease-in-out infinite",
                filter: "drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(20, 184, 166, 0.6))"
              },
              "data-fg-bach9": "418.170:655.2347:/src/app/components/VoiceInput.tsx:199:11:6065:269:e:Mic::::::ELnR"
            },
            void 0,
            false,
            {
              fileName: "/workspaces/default/code/src/app/components/VoiceInput.tsx",
              lineNumber: 219,
              columnNumber: 9
            },
            this
          ),
          /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("style", { "data-fg-bach10": "418.170:655.2347:/src/app/components/VoiceInput.tsx:207:9:6354:1198:e:style:s", children: `
          @keyframes mic-breathe {
            0%, 100% {
              box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(20, 184, 166, 0.6),

              transform: scale(1);
            }
            50% {
              box-shadow: 0 0 0 8px rgba(20, 184, 166, 0),

            }
          }

            0%, 100% {
              opacity: 1;
              transform: scale(1);
            }
            50% {
              opacity: 0.85;

            }
          }

            0%, 100% {
              opacity: 0.3;
              transform: scale(1);
            }
            50% {
              opacity: 0.6;
              transform: scale(1.1);
            }
          }

          @keyframes mic-ring-2 {
            0%, 100% {

              transform: scale(1);

              transform: scale(1.15);
            }

            fileName: "/workspaces/default/code/src/app/components/VoiceInput.tsx",

          }, this)
        ]
      },
      void 0,
      true,
      {
        fileName: "/workspaces/default/code/src/app/components/VoiceInput.tsx",
        lineNumber: 188,
        columnNumber: 7
      },
      this
    );
  }
  return /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(
    FGCmp,
    {
      _fgT: "button",
      _fgS: "bach12",
      _fgB: 1779104383612,
      _fgD: true,
      onClick: toggleRecording,
      disabled: isProcessing,
      type: "button",
      className: `${currentSize.button} rounded-lg font-medium transition-all flex items-center gap-2 ${isRecording ? "bg-red-500 hover:bg-red-600 text-white animate-pulse" : isProcessing ? "bg-teal-500/50 text-teal-200 cursor-wait" : "bg-gradient-to-r from-teal-500/20 to-teal-600/20 hover:from-teal-500/30 hover:to-teal-600/30 text-teal-300 border-2 border-teal-400/40"} disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed ${className}`,
      "data-fg-bach12": "418.170:655.2347:/src/app/components/VoiceInput.tsx:260:5:7616:990:e:button:x:1",
      children: isProcessing ? /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(Fragment, { children: [
        /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: Loader2, _fgS: "bach15", _fgB: 1779104383612, className: `${currentSize.iconSize} animate-spin`, "data-fg-bach15": "418.170:655.2347:/src/app/components/VoiceInput.tsx:274:11:8249:62:e:Loader2::::::XrB" }, void 0, false, {
          fileName: "/workspaces/default/code/src/app/components/VoiceInput.tsx",
          lineNumber: 294,
          columnNumber: 11
        }, this),
        "Processing..."
      ] }, void 0, true, {
        fileName: "/workspaces/default/code/src/app/components/VoiceInput.tsx",
        lineNumber: 293,
        columnNumber: 7
      }, this) : isRecording ? /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(Fragment, { children: [
        /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: MicOff, _fgS: "bach18", _fgB: 1779104383612, className: currentSize.iconSize, "data-fg-bach18": "418.170:655.2347:/src/app/components/VoiceInput.tsx:279:11:8395:43:e:MicOff::::::Bvbi" }, void 0, false, {

_s(VoiceInput, "SWvcxq5H4FLzcAncCHLwu4DoMsk=");
_c = VoiceInput;
var _c;
$RefreshReg$(_c, "VoiceInput");
if (import.meta.hot && !inWebWorker) {
  window.$RefreshReg$ = prevRefreshReg;
  window.$RefreshSig$ = prevRefreshSig;
}
if (import.meta.hot && !inWebWorker) {
  RefreshRuntime.__hmr_import(import.meta.url).then((currentExports) => {
    RefreshRuntime.registerExportsForReactRefresh("/workspaces/default/code/src/app/components/VoiceInput.tsx", currentExports);
    import.meta.hot.accept((nextExports) => {
      if (!nextExports) return;
      const invalidateMessage = RefreshRuntime.validateRefreshBoundaryAndEnqueueUpdate("/workspaces/default/code/src/app/components/VoiceInput.tsx", currentExports, nextExports);
      if (invalidateMessage) import.meta.hot.invalidate(invalidateMessage);
    });
  });
}
